index 6ded892..f2ca483 100644

+++ b/README.md
@@ -81,7 +81,7 @@ Make sure `pigz`, `wget`, and `unzip` are installed:

\ No newline at end of file

+++ b/README.md
@@ -47,7 +47,9 @@ Each Replica contains the following assets:
     ├── info_semantic.json
     ├── mesh_preseg_semantic.ply 
     ├── mesh_preseg_semantic.navmesh
-    └── info_preseg_semantic.json

 - `habitat/mesh*semantic.ply`: the quad meshes including semantic or presegmentation information for AI Habitat. 
 - `habitat/info*semantic.json`: mapping from instance IDs in the respective `mesh_*.ply` to semantic names.
 - `habitat/mesh*semantic.navmesh`: navigation grid for AI Habitat.

+brew install wget pigz unzip
 # on Ubuntu
-sudo apt-get install pigz

 ```
 To download and decompress the dataset use the `download.sh` script:
 ```

 To use Replica within AI Habitat checkout the AI Habitat Sim at [https://github.com/facebookresearch/habitat-sim](https://github.com/facebookresearch/habitat-sim).
 After building the project you can launch the test viewer to verify that everything works:

+./build/viewer --dataset /PATH/TO/REPLICA/replica.scene_dataset_config.json -- frl_apartment_0
 ```
 
 ## Team

author: Christian Rauch
message: user system libraries if available
patch:
commit c37e6e6c5070fdd78d150b981cc2da4cd57d3862
Author: Christian Rauch <Christian.Rauch@ed.ac.uk>
Date:   Tue Feb 18 15:46:35 2020 +0000

    user system libraries if available
---
 CMakeLists.txt | 18 ++++++++++++++----
 1 file changed, 14 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/CMakeLists.txt b/CMakeLists.txt
index 43db0dc..b53f765 100644
--- a/CMakeLists.txt
+++ b/CMakeLists.txt
@@ -7,10 +7,20 @@ set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH ${CMAKE_MODULE_PATH} "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/cmake/")
 
 set(THIRD_PARTY "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/3rdparty/")
 
-set(Eigen_INCLUDE_DIRS "${THIRD_PARTY}/eigen") 
-set(Pangolin_INCLUDE_DIRS "${THIRD_PARTY}/Pangolin/build/src/include")
-list(APPEND Pangolin_INCLUDE_DIRS "${THIRD_PARTY}/Pangolin/include") 
-set(Pangolin_LIBRARIES "${THIRD_PARTY}/Pangolin/build/src/libpangolin.so") 
+find_package(Eigen3 NO_MODULE)
+if(NOT ${Eigen3_FOUND})
+    message(STATUS "Using 3rd party Eigen3")
+    set(Eigen_INCLUDE_DIRS "${THIRD_PARTY}/eigen")
+endif()
+
+# use system Pangolin if available
+find_package(Pangolin)
+if(NOT ${Pangolin_FOUND})
+    message(STATUS "Using 3rd party Pangolin")
+    set(Pangolin_INCLUDE_DIRS "${THIRD_PARTY}/Pangolin/build/src/include")
+    list(APPEND Pangolin_INCLUDE_DIRS "${THIRD_PARTY}/Pangolin/include")
+    set(Pangolin_LIBRARIES "${THIRD_PARTY}/Pangolin/build/src/libpangolin.so")
+endif()
 
 find_package(dl REQUIRED)

author: Vladimír Vondruš
message: Improve the download script
patch:
commit a0ecec8edee9ec5509747bd53cfc222e28d23a68
Author: Vladimír Vondruš <mosra@centrum.cz>
Date:   Tue Jul 16 22:50:48 2019 +0200

    Improve the download script
    
     * Abort in case of an error
     * Create the output directory in case it doesn't exist yet
     * Resume partial downloads instead of downloading everything again
---
 download.sh | 13 ++++++++++---
 1 file changed, 10 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/download.sh b/download.sh
index 79cc5a6..7791f7c 100755
--- a/download.sh
+++ b/download.sh
@@ -1,15 +1,22 @@
 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 
+# Abort on error
+set -e
+
 if [ "$1" != "" ]; then
-  echo "Downloading and decompressing Replica to $1"
+  echo -e "\nDownloading and decompressing Replica to $1. The script can resume\npartial downloads -- if your download gets interrupted, simply run it again.\n"
 else
   echo "Specify a path to download and decompress Replica to!"
   exit 1
 fi
 
 for p in {a..q}
-do 
-  wget https://github.com/facebookresearch/Replica-Dataset/releases/download/v1.0/replica_v1_0.tar.gz.parta$p
+do
+  # Ensure files are continued in case the script gets interrupted halfway through
+  wget --continue https://github.com/facebookresearch/Replica-Dataset/releases/download/v1.0/replica_v1_0.tar.gz.parta$p
 done
 
+# Create the destination directory if it doesn't exist yet
+mkdir -p $1
+
 cat replica_v1_0.tar.gz.part?? | unpigz -p 32  | tar -xvC $1

index 0df0656..a20b0cd 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -32,11 +32,6 @@ If you use the Replica dataset in your research, please cite the following

-To download and decompress the dataset use the `download.sh` script:
-```

-```
-
 The following 18 scenes are included in this initial release:
 
 ![Replica Dataset](./assets/ReplicaDataset.png)
@@ -76,6 +71,22 @@ The different files contain the following:
 - `habitat/info*semantic.json`: mapping from instance IDs in the respective `mesh_*.ply` to semantic names.
 - `habitat/mesh*semantic.navmesh`: navigation grid for AI Habitat.
 
+### Download on Mac OS and Linux
+Make sure `pigz` and `wget` are installed:
+```
+# on Mac OS
+brew install wget pigz
+# on Ubuntu
+sudo apt-get install pigz
+```
+To download and decompress the dataset use the `download.sh` script:
+```
+./download.sh /path/to/replica_v1
+```
+
+### Download on Windows
+
+Execute `win_download.bat` to download Replica.
 
 ## Replica SDK

author: Rick James
message: Switch to curl (vs wget), which is included with Win10 1803.
patch:
commit 94078952dc34ae24be4cc2db671b6e787684287e
Author: Rick James <rkj@fb.com>
Date:   Mon Jul 1 12:58:34 2019 -0700

    Switch to curl (vs wget), which is included with Win10 1803.
    
            Do part merge, and untar, in the same script.
---
 win_download.bat | 44 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++--
 win_merge.bat    |  9 ---------
 2 files changed, 42 insertions(+), 11 deletions(-)

diff --git a/win_download.bat b/win_download.bat
index e707310..81b8fe4 100644
--- a/win_download.bat
+++ b/win_download.bat
@@ -1,5 +1,45 @@
+@echo off
 set TARGET=c:\\replica
+
+if NOT EXIST %TARGET% (
+    mkdir %TARGET%
+)
+
 cd /d %TARGET%
-for %%p in (a b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) do (
-c:\\tools\\wget https://github.com/facebookresearch/Replica-Dataset/releases/download/v1.0/replica_v1_0.tar.gz.parta%%p
+if ERRORLEVEL 1 (
+    echo failed to change directory to %TARGET%
+    goto :eof
+)
+
+if EXIST merge.tar.gz (
+    echo merge.tar.gz already exists, delete it please
+    goto :eof
+)
+
+REM curl and tar are included in Win10 1803
+REM source: https://devblogs.microsoft.com/commandline/tar-and-curl-come-to-windows/
+
+echo Downloading parts..
+for %%p in (a b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p q) do (
+    curl --location --remote-name https://github.com/facebookresearch/Replica-Dataset/releases/download/v1.0/replica_v1_0.tar.gz.parta%%p
+)
+
+echo Merging parts..
+copy /b replica_v1_0.tar.gz.part* merge.tar.gz
+if ERRORLEVEL 1 (
+    echo failed to create merge.tar.gz
+    goto :eof
+)
+
+echo Unzipping merge.tar.gz..
+tar -xvzf merge.tar.gz
+if ERRORLEVEL 1 (
+    echo failed to unzip merge.tar.gz
+    goto :eof
 )
+
+echo Deleting merge.tar.gz..
+del merge.tar.gz
+
+echo Finished. 
+echo (Consider deleting replica_v1_0.tar.gz.part* to save disk space)
diff --git a/win_merge.bat b/win_merge.bat
deleted file mode 100644
index 99b9462..0000000
--- a/win_merge.bat
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,9 +0,0 @@
-set TARGET=c:\\replica
-cd /d %TARGET%
-if EXIST merge.tar.gz (
-    echo error merge.tar.gz exists, delete it please
-    goto :eof
-)
-copy /b replica_v1_0.tar.gz.part* merge.tar.gz
-
-REM Then run: tar -xvzf merge.tar.gz

author: Rick James
message: Adds basic scripts for downloading and merging Replica data
patch:
commit b00b3cf90df258567d83459a131a44833553b39d
Author: Rick James <rkj@fb.com>
Date:   Mon Jul 1 10:25:05 2019 -0700

    Adds basic scripts for downloading and merging Replica data
---
 win_download.bat | 5 +++++
 win_merge.bat    | 9 +++++++++
 2 files changed, 14 insertions(+)

diff --git a/win_download.bat b/win_download.bat
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..e707310
--- /dev/null
+++ b/win_download.bat
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+set TARGET=c:\\replica
+cd /d %TARGET%
+for %%p in (a b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) do (
+c:\\tools\\wget https://github.com/facebookresearch/Replica-Dataset/releases/download/v1.0/replica_v1_0.tar.gz.parta%%p
+)
diff --git a/win_merge.bat b/win_merge.bat
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..99b9462
--- /dev/null
+++ b/win_merge.bat
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+set TARGET=c:\\replica
+cd /d %TARGET%
+if EXIST merge.tar.gz (
+    echo error merge.tar.gz exists, delete it please
+    goto :eof
+)
+copy /b replica_v1_0.tar.gz.part* merge.tar.gz
+
+REM Then run: tar -xvzf merge.tar.gz

author: Thomas Whelan
message: Fix backface culling (reversed due to flip projection matrix) and fix mirror framebuffer compositing in headless renderer.
